## Pull Request Description
Clearly and concisely describe the problem. Try to answer the following questions: what, why, and how?

## How to test?
Please add the necessary steps and/or prerequisites to test the feature.
Please don't put here how to execute automated tests, but how to test the feature manually.

## Screenshots (Optional)
I added some images to clarify the execution steps or the feature itself.

## Link Documentation
This is the link to the documentation that explains the feature.
e.g. https://stefaninisophiedelivery.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/SOE/pages/1328906241/Live+Agent

## Link Jira
This is the link to the Jira issues that explain the feature
e.g., https://stefaninisophiedelivery.atlassian.net/jira/software/projects/SOE/boards/120

## Checklist

Before submitting this PR, please make sure:

- [ ] Have you read
  the [guidelines for contributing](https://github.com/stefanini-applications/developer-guide)?
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented on my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published in downstream modules
- [ ] Require dependency update?
- [ ] Documentation has been reviewed and added/updated
- [ ] I link this pull request on Jira's comments
- [ ] Passed by lint

## Anything Else?

You should delve into possible architecture changes or technical debt here. Call out challenges, optimizations,
etc.
